overall.description: First-person vehicle driving through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring the iconic Orbital Air neon sign, elevated highways, and a large suspension bridge. The journey progresses from a straight urban road past towering skyscrapers to a curved waterfront highway with dense commercial buildings and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with neon-lit skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along a straight elevated highway, approaching a large overhead billboard structure

entered.detail: large green neon sign reading 'ORBITAL AIR' mounted on a futuristic skyscraper
concrete divider separating the road from the lower level
tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway
dense cluster of tall buildings with neon signs and glass facades
large overhead gantry structure spanning the road with digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a straight elevated highway in a futuristic city, with the iconic Orbital Air neon sign dominating the left skyline. The vehicle drives past palm trees on the right and approaches an overhead billboard structure in the distance, with towering glass skyscrapers lining the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront highway passing under billboard structure

events.description: passes under the overhead billboard structure, revealing water and a large suspension bridge ahead
water body becomes clearly visible on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the highway, now driving alongside a waterfront with a large bridge visible ahead

entered.detail: calm water visible beyond the concrete barrier on the left side
large cable-stayed bridge spanning the water in the distance
digital billboard displaying an advertisement with text 'Every Night'

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the overhead billboard structure, revealing a waterfront view with a large suspension bridge ahead. The Orbital Air sign and palm trees recede behind as the road continues straight alongside the water, with futuristic buildings now appearing on the right skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront highway with dense commercial buildings

events.description: road begins curving to the right as the vehicle approaches the bridge
blue sports car and black sedan pass by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating a rightward curve along the waterfront, passing other vehicles while approaching the suspension bridge

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in the right lane, overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall commercial buildings with colorful neon signs and steam vents
industrial steam rising from vents on the right-side buildings
bright neon advertisements and corporate logos on building facades

segments.scene_description: The highway curves rightward along the waterfront, bringing the suspension bridge closer into view. Dense futuristic commercial buildings with neon signs and steam vents line the right side, while other vehicles pass by. The road continues curving toward the bridge structure with the water now visible further to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a skyscraper-lined urban corridor to a curving waterfront approach. It begins on a straight stretch of road dominated by the glowing Orbital Air neon sign and towering glass buildings to the left, while palm trees line the right. As the vehicle passes under a massive overhead billboard, the urban density opens up to reveal a wide waterfront view with a large suspension bridge appearing in the distance. The scene then shifts as the highway curves rightward, bringing the bridge closer while the skyline transforms into a dense cluster of commercial buildings featuring neon advertisements and steam vents. Finally, the camera glides along the bend, passing other vehicles as the water recedes to the left and the road leads directly toward the massive bridge structure.
